compartments.label: Lumen
compartments.snippet: Top strip above microvilli, labeled 'Lumen' top-left; contains P. aeruginosa, Pyocyanin, Pyoverdine, FSHR-1, ExoA, PCN

compartments.label: Intestinal cell
compartments.snippet: Large outer box labeled 'Intestinal cell' bottom-left; contains the bulk of the pathway components

compartments.label: Mitochondria
compartments.snippet: Central organelle inside Intestinal cell, labeled 'Mitochondria'; contains UPRmt, mtROS, +Fe3+ labels

compartments.label: Nucleus
compartments.snippet: Large oval at bottom center of Intestinal cell labeled 'Nucleus'; contains ESRE, cellular stress response genes, antimicrobial defence genes

compartments.label: LRO
compartments.snippet: Circular vesicle on left side of Intestinal cell labeled 'LRO stress pH increase'

genes.snippet: Transmembrane receptor glyph, blue, in Lumen region right of center
Labeled TIR-1/SARM1, receptor/transmembrane glyph, left side of Intestinal cell

Yellow oval labeled SEK-1/MAPKK inside Intestinal cell
Yellow oval labeled PMK-1/p38 MAPK inside Intestinal cell

Purple box labeled ATFS-1/ATF-4 inside Intestinal cell
Purple box labeled HIF-1 inside Intestinal cell

Purple box labeled NHR-86/HNF-4 far right of Intestinal cell

tentative_edges.snippet: Pyocyanin (green hexagon, Lumen) --> TIR-1/SARM1 (pointed arrow, crosses membrane); line noted as slightly faint
TIR-1/SARM1 --> LRO stress pH increase (pointed arrow inside Intestinal cell)
LRO stress pH increase --> NSY-1 (pointed arrow)
NSY-1 --> SEK-1 (pointed arrow, canonical p38 MAPK cascade)
SEK-1 --> PMK-1 (pointed arrow, canonical p38 MAPK cascade)
PMK-1 --> ATF-7 (pointed arrow, left lower pathway)
PMK-1 --> DAF-16/SKN-1/HSF-1 cluster (grouped connector, upward; uncertain which exact targets)
PMK-1 --> DAF-16/SKN-1/HSF-1 cluster (grouped connector, upward; uncertain which exact targets)
PMK-1 --> DAF-16/SKN-1/HSF-1 cluster (grouped connector, upward; uncertain which exact targets)
ATF-7 --> antimicrobial defence genes (pointed arrow into Nucleus)
DAF-16/FOXO --> cellular stress response genes (pointed arrow into Nucleus)
SKN-1/Nrf2 --> cellular stress response genes (pointed arrow into Nucleus)
HSF-1 --> cellular stress response genes / antimicrobial defence genes (pointed arrow into Nucleus)
HSF-1 --> antimicrobial defence genes (pointed arrow into Nucleus) [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
HSF-1 -- ROS box connector; direction and relation type ambiguous/uncertain per transcription notes
Pyoverdine (Lumen) --> Mitochondria (pointed arrow; iron sequestration mechanism)
+Fe3+ label at top-right of Mitochondria organelle; iron into mitochondria (pointed arrow)
UPRmt / Mitochondria --> HSP-60 (pointed arrow); UPRmt noted inside Mitochondria organelle
HSP-60 --> ATFS-1 area / nucleus (pointed); flagged as uncertain in transcription
ATFS-1/ATF-4 --> ESRE (pointed arrow into Nucleus)
mtROS (label inside Mitochondria) --> HIF-1 (pointed arrow)
mtROS (label inside Mitochondria) --> AMPK (pointed arrow)
HIF-1 --> ESRE / nucleus genes (pointed arrow into Nucleus)
AMPK --> (downward into nucleus genes); target described as faint/uncertain in transcription
ExoA (green hexagon, Lumen) --| Translation (T-bar / inhibition); ExoA inhibits Translation in Intestinal cell; best reading flagged uncertain [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
Translation --> connects toward ESRE/ZIP regulators with '?' label; direction and identity uncertain
FSHR-1 --> downward with '?' label; uncertain pathway per transcription
PCN (green hexagon, Lumen) --> NHR-86/HNF-4 (pointed, down right side); flagged uncertain
ZIP-4 --> ZIP-2 (pointed); flagged uncertain in transcription
CEBP-1/2 --> ZIP-2 (pointed); flagged uncertain in transcription
CEBP-1/2 --> ZIP-2 (pointed); CEBP-2 secondary label, flagged uncertain
ZIP-2 --> ESRE (pointed) / antimicrobial defence genes in Nucleus [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
ZIP-2 --> antimicrobial defence genes in Nucleus
ESRE --> cellular stress response genes (pointed) inside Nucleus [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
ESRE --> antimicrobial defence genes (pointed) inside Nucleus [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
NHR-86/HNF-4 --> antimicrobial defence genes (pointed arrow into Nucleus)
